blockers: Actual Dhan auth cannot be proven by static repo; needs Render API probe and user refreshed token if invalid.
description: Dhan broker auth and connected-vs-token contradiction
findings: Broker UI has token-aware connected logic.
Backend has broker diagnose endpoint for env/token probe.
Backend checks Dhan env presence in diagnose route.
required_fixes: User must refresh/update Dhan read-only token securely if Render probe shows invalid/expired.
Visual proof must show Broker panel BLOCKED/TOKEN ERROR or valid broker proof; no misleading CONNECTED.
